prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-CAMPUTENSIL-MULTITOOL-STEEL-IR-TT Product Type: MULTITOOL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 7 in 1 Camping Essential EDC Folding Pocket Multi-Tool Carry Pouch Description: Be prepared for any outdoor situation with the ASR Outdoor 7 in 1 Multi-function pocket tool. This tool comes with 7 different essential camping tools - a spoon, clip point knife, fork, can opener, corkscrew, bottle opener, and a tent reamer. All of these tools can come in handy in an emergency situation where you need to procure food or shelter.

3 of the 7 multi-tool utensils are completely detachable from the body of the tool which will make it easier to cut, prepare and eat food or drinks out in the field. The spoon, knife, and 4 pronged fork can all be removed without disrupting the integrity of the multi-tool.

Designed to be compact and portable, this multi-tools measures just 5" in length overall with a folded length of 4.25". It only weighs 5.6oz so it won't add a bunch of weight to your camping or hiking gear, and is constructed of durable, high-quality stainless steel that won't rust.

To keep the tools and utensils safe when not in use, we've included a sturdy nylon carrying pouch. The pouch comes with a hook and loop closure and can be attached to your pocket or belt for quick access. Make sure to grab one of these before your next outdoor adventure. Search Terms: survivor series multifunctional camping tool detachable utensil units pouch hiking stainless steel longlasting durable lightweight prong fork spoon clip point saber grind knife can opener bottle corkscrew tent reamer compact pocket size nylon pouch Features: - 7 IN 1 MULTI-FUNCTION TOOL - The ASR Outdoor camping multi-tool comes with 7 different essential outdoor tools for camping, hiking, and everyday carry - a 4 prong fork, spoon, clip-point knife, can opener, bottle opener, corkscrew, and tent reamer. These tools will come in handy in an outdoor emergency or food procurement situation. - DETACHABLE UTENSILS - The spoon, knife, and fork utensils can be completely detached from the body of the tool which will make it easier to cut, prepare and eat food out in the field. Don't worry about the body getting in the way during precision work. - COMPACT AND PORTABLE - This compact multi-tool measures just 5" x 1.75" x 1.75" overall and just 4.25" once folded, making it the ideal EDC size. It weighs only 5.6oz so it won't add a bunch of bulk to your outdoor gear. It's made of durable, high-quality stainless steel that won't rust in poor weather conditions. - NYLON CARRY POUCH - To keep the utensils and other tools safely secured when not in use, we've included a sturdy black nylon pouch. The pouch features a hook and loop closure and the whole unit can be attached to a belt or pocket for quick deployment. - SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: stainless steel, nylon; Colors: chrome, black; 7 function tool: knife, spoon, fork, corkscrew, bottle opener, tent reamer & can opener; Dimensions: 5" x 1.75" x .75" overall; Folded length: 4.25"; Weight: 5.6oz (.35lbs) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
